Input

Output
0 XNOR25 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR36 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR47 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 NOT5 = NOT(1) = 0

5 OR-NOT07 = OR(0,NOT(1)) = 0
